observed_blockers: Reviewers could not see whether downstream implementation feedback had been captured.
validation_gaps: Human review feedback needs a listable JSON representation.
recurring_failures: Suggested contract changes were discussed but not recorded as planning input.
suggested_contract_changes: Clarify that feedback can inform future planning but does not mutate locked state.
raw_summary: The human team wants implementation feedback preserved for the next planning cycle without changing readiness state automatically.
